archetype: Mixed: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for Focus Mode, Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) for Game Mode

rules: Headings must use Outfit, never Inter.
Never center headings by default, align left unless in a specific symmetrical hero section.
Keep line height tight for headers (leading-none or leading-tight) and loose for body (leading-relaxed).

focus_mode.description: Minimal dark UI, clean typography, no animations, muted colors, data-first.
ui_characteristics: Minimal gradients, pure flat dark colors
Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact
Monochrome with very subtle purple tints for active states only
No particle effects, no glowing shadows, no animations (disable Framer Motion)

game_mode.description: Full glassmorphism, glowing purple accents, animated XP bars, particle effects, celebrations.
ui_characteristics: Animated progress bars and dynamic counters
Neon edge lighting and 'Tracing Beam' effects

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Bento Grid protocol. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 for Marketing, grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for Dashboard.
layout_and_spacing.padding: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside bordered containers. py-20 or py-32 for marketing sections.
layout_and_spacing.radius: Game Mode: rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Focus Mode: rounded-sm or rounded-none for a brutalist edge.
rules: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding to prevent text collision.
Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.
Grid items must be direct children of the grid container.

components.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized. Focus: solid white or gray, sharp edges. Game: glowing purple gradient, rounded, hover lift.
components.cards: Avoid generic 'card' component. Build custom with standard divs. Game: Glassmorphism. Focus: Flat with 1px border.
components.inputs: Shadcn Input. Always include a visible focus ring.
components.navigation: Sticky header (z-50) with backdrop-blur-xl and bg-black/60.
components.tabs: Override default height. Use h-auto. Focus: underline active. Game: glowing pill background active.

rules: Always explicitly set hover states (e.g., hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white).
Focus states must have HIGHER contrast, not lower.
Respect prefers-reduced-motion, especially in Game Mode.
Use framer-motion for Game Mode (staggered list entrances, progress bar fills). Disable for Focus Mode.

image_urls.description: Dark geometric purple background for the marketing hero section.
Neon purple gaming controller to visually represent the Game Mode in features or onboarding.
Dark, minimal abstract background to visually represent the Focus Mode in features or onboarding.
Subtle dark purple wavy lines for the login/signup split screen background.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: You are working with .jsx and .js files. Do NOT use .tsx or .ts.
Implement a global React Context (e.g., ModeProvider) to manage 'focus' vs 'game' modes. This context should inject a CSS class or variable to the root to easily toggle styles.
For Game Mode, utilize Framer Motion for animations. For Focus Mode, render components without Framer Motion wrappers or set animation durations to 0.
Use standard HTML tags for layout structure (div, section) heavily styled with Tailwind, rather than relying on Shadcn structural components.
Ensure high contrast ratios (APCA preferred). The background is near black (#0A0A0A) and text should be highly legible (#F7F7F7).
Never use generic sans-serif (Inter) for headings. Use the designated 'Outfit' display font.
